rationale: No qualitative escalation in the war this cycle, but Iran deal stalemate keeps US attention diverted and Western aid continuity remains an active concern for Ukrainians.

top_events.title: Tehran says 'nothing' finalised after Trump claims Iran deal near
top_events.summary: Continued Iran-US stalemate keeps Washington's diplomatic bandwidth occupied, sustaining risk that US focus and aid momentum for Ukraine remains under pressure.

top_events.title: France-Germany jet plans: Can Europe end reliance on US for security?
top_events.summary: European defence autonomy debate is directly relevant to Ukraine — stronger EU defence capacity could mean more sustained support independent of US political cycles.

top_events.title: Active war with Russia continues without new escalation
top_events.summary: War ongoing with no qualitative change this cycle; air strikes and front-line activity continue as background reality for Ukrainian civilians.
